pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 23-125 (sets APP_DIR and writes the sample app) and README.md lines 13-16 (starting state lists /home/ga/insecure-app)
setup_task.sh lines 72-85 (docker-compose service exposes port 8090) and README.md line 25 (app must remain accessible on port 8090)
setup_task.sh lines 55-90 (Dockerfile and compose comments enumerate four CIS violations) and README.md lines 8-31 (task statement lists the same four violations)
README.md line 19 (goal description) and export_result.sh lines 15-98 (export logic explicitly looks for secure-web:hardened container/image)

privileged_info_summary: The task setup script generates a synthetic nginx app entirely under /home/ga/insecure-app, starts it on port 8090 with a compose file that intentionally violates four CIS Docker Benchmark controls, and the export logic demands a redeployment tagged secure-web:hardened.
